Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What internship programs do you offer?

A: We offer comprehensive paid internship programs in various fields including AI/ML, Big Data Engineering, Full Stack Development, Graphic Design, Performance Marketing, HR Management, Content Creation, and more.

Q: How long are the internship programs?

A: Our programs range from 3 months (Pro) to 6 months (Enterprise), depending on the package you choose.

Q: Are the internships paid?

A: Yes, all our internships are paid programs with structured operations and mentorship included.

Q: Do I need prior experience?

A: Our programs cater to all levels from beginners to advanced learners. We provide comprehensive training regardless of your experience level.

Q: Will I receive a certificate?

A: Yes, upon successful completion of the program, you will receive an internship completion certificate.

Q: What support is provided during the internship?

A: We provide mentorship sessions, career guidance, communication skill development, and client handling introduction.

Terms and Conditions

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using Error Infotech's internship programs, you accept and agree to be bound by these terms and conditions.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old to participate in our internship programs. By registering, you confirm that all information provided is accurate and complete.

3. Internship Program Terms

Participation in our internship programs requires commitment to complete the assigned tasks and operations. Failure to meet minimum requirements may result in non-completion of the program.

4. Payment and Refunds

All payments are non-refundable unless specifically stated. Payment plans and refund policies will be communicated at the time of enrollment.

5. Intellectual Property

All course materials, content, and intellectual property remain the property of Error Infotech. Students may not reproduce or distribute materials without permission.

6. Confidentiality

Students may have access to confidential information during the internship. This information must not be disclosed to third parties.

7. Limitation of Liability

Error Infotech shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from participation in our programs.

8. Modifications

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of such modifications.

×

Privacy Policy

1. Information We Collect

We collect personal information including name, email address, phone number, and other details you provide during registration or communication.

2. How We Use Your Information

Your information is used to provide and improve our internship programs, communicate with you, process applications, and send relevant updates.

3. Data Protection

We implement appropriate security measures to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction of your personal information.

4. Sharing of Information

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal identification information to others. We may share generic aggregated demographic information not linked to any personal identification information.

5. Cookies

We use cookies to understand and save your preferences for future visits and compile aggregate data about site traffic and site interaction.

6. Third Party Disclosure

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer to outside parties your personally identifiable information unless we provide users with advance notice.

7. Data Retention

We retain your personal information as long as necessary to provide you with our services and comply with legal obligations.

8. Your Rights

You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. Contact us to exercise these rights.
